revision.comment: Bot: create Islamic-calendar day stub
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: overwrite Islamic-day stub
revision.text:
{{Expand Arabic}} {{Expand Bengali}} {{Expand Persian}} '''Sha'ban 30''' is a day of the [[Islamic calendar]]. It is the 30th day of the month [[Sha'ban]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Days 30 of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Sha'ban]] [[ar:30 شعبان]] [[fa:۳۰ شعبان]] [[sd:30 شعبان]] [[ur:30 شعبان]]

{{Expand Arabic}} {{Expand Bengali}} {{Expand Persian}} '''Sha'ban 30''' is a day of the [[Islamic calendar]]. It is the 30th day of the month [[Sha'ban]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Days 30 of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Sha'ban]] [[ar:30 شعبان]] [[fa:۳۰ شعبان]] [[sd:30 شعبان]] [[ur:30 شعبان]] {{Islamic Calendar}}

revision.comment: Bot: overwrite Islamic-day stub
revision.text:
{{Expand Arabic}} {{Expand Bengali}} {{Expand Persian}} '''Sha'ban 30''' is a day of the [[Islamic calendar]]. It is the 30th day of the month [[Sha'ban]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Days 30 of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Sha'ban]] [[ar:30 شعبان]] [[fa:۳۰ شعبان]] [[sd:30 شعبان]] [[ur:30 شعبان]]

revision.comment: Bot: undo edit ([[Special:Diff/4136055]])
Text replacement - "{{Expand Arabic}}↵{{Expand Bengali}}↵{{Expand Persian}}" to ""
adding the templates to the front above the calendar template
bumping these so I can see the more important ones that have not been recently edited
Bot: add wikidata link from Arabic interwiki (Q4121770)
working on the date checking
Adding [[Category:Qq 4]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] to [[Category:Qq 1]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Unchecked Islamic Dates]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Qq 1]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "[[Category:Qq 4]]" to ""
Bot: add interwikis from Wikidata
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ar:30 شعبان]][[fa:۳۰ شعبان]][[ms:30 Syaaban]][[sd:30 شعبان]][[ur:30 شعبان]]
{{Expand Arabic}}
{{Expand Bengali}}
{{Expand Persian}}
{{Islamic Sha'ban}}

'''Sha'ban 30''' is a day of the [[Islamic calendar]]. It is the 30th day of the month [[Sha'ban]].

==See also==
* [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]]
[[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]]
[[Category:Days 30 of the Islamic Calendar]]
[[Category:Sha'ban]]
[[ar:30 شعبان]]
[[fa:۳۰ شعبان]]
[[sd:30 شعبان]]
[[ur:30 شعبان]]
{{Islamic Calendar}}
[[Category:wikidata linked Islamic Dates]]
[[Category:wikidata linked Islamic Dates]]{{wikidata link|Q4121770}}

'''Sha'ban 30''' is a day of the [[Islamic calendar]]. It is the 30th day of the month [[Sha'ban]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Days 30 of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Sha'ban]] [[ar:30 شعبان]] [[fa:۳۰ شعبان]] [[sd:30 شعبان]] [[ur:30 شعبان]] {{Islamic Calendar}} [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]]{{wikidata link|Q4121770}} [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]] [[Category:qq]]{{wikidata link|Q1}}[[Category:qq]] [[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]] [[Category:qq]]{{wikidata link|Q1}}[[Category:qq]] [[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]] [[Category:qq]]{{wikidata link|Q1}}[[Category:qq]] [[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]] [[Category:qq]]{{wikidata link|Q1}}[[Category:qq]]

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:Pages without translation templates]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ar:30 شعبان]][[fa:۳۰ شعبان]][[ms:30 Syaaban]][[sd:30 شعبان]][[ur:30 شعبان]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ar:30 شعبان]][[fa:۳۰ شعبان]][[ms:30 Syaaban]][[sd:30 شعبان]][[ur:30 شعبان]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ar:30 شعبان]][[fa:۳۰ شعبان]][[ms:30 Syaaban]][[sd:30 شعبان]][[ur:30 شعبان]] {{Expand Arabic}} {{Expand Bengali}} {{Expand Persian}} {{Islamic Sha'ban}}
'''Sha'ban 30''' is a day of the [[Islamic calendar]]. It is the 30th day of the month [[Sha'ban]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[ar:30 شعبان]] [[fa:۳۰ شعبان]] [[sd:30 شعبان]] [[ur:30 شعبان]] {{Islamic Calendar}}
{{wikidata link|Q4121770}} [[Category:Days 30 of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Sha'ban]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:Pages without translation templates]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Removing from [[Category:Qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

{{Expand Arabic}}
{{Expand Bengali}}
{{Expand Persian}}
{{Islamic Sha'ban}}

'''Sha'ban 30''' is a day of the [[Islamic calendar]]. It is the 30th day of the month [[Sha'ban]].

==See also==
* [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]]
[[ar:30 شعبان]]
[[fa:۳۰ شعبان]]
[[sd:30 شعبان]]
[[ur:30 شعبان]]
